description: EDOT Assistant metadata enrichment — extract section paths and set defaults

script.source: if (ctx.url != null) { def url = ctx.url; def path = url.replaceAll('https?://[^/]+', ''); path = path.replaceAll('\\?.*', ''); path = path.replaceAll('#.*', ''); ctx.section_path = path; }

script.description: Auto-detect language_sdk from URL or repo path
script.source: if (ctx.language_sdk == null && ctx.url != null) { def url = ctx.url.toLowerCase(); if (url.contains('python') || url.contains('otel-python')) { ctx.language_sdk = 'python'; } else if (url.contains('java') || url.contains('otel-java')) { ctx.language_sdk = 'java'; } else if (url.contains('node') || url.contains('otel-node') || url.contains('javascript')) { ctx.language_sdk = 'nodejs'; } else if (url.contains('dotnet') || url.contains('otel-dotnet') || url.contains('.net')) { ctx.language_sdk = 'dotnet'; } else if (url.contains('android') || url.contains('otel-android')) { ctx.language_sdk = 'android'; } else if (url.contains('go') || url.contains('otel-go')) { ctx.language_sdk = 'go'; } }
